title: Discord Channel
description: A channel in Discord represents a text, voice, category, thread, forum, or other communication medium within a guild or direct message.

guild_id.description: ID of the guild the channel belongs to

permission_overwrites.description: Explicit permission overwrites for members and roles

topic.description: Channel topic (0-4096 characters for forum/media, 0-1024 otherwise)

last_message_id.description: ID of the last message sent in this channel

bitrate.description: Bitrate of the voice or stage channel

user_limit.description: User limit of the voice or stage channel

icon.description: Icon hash of the group DM

owner_id.description: ID of the creator of the group DM or thread

parent_id.description: ID of the parent category or channel

last_pin_timestamp.description: When the last pinned message was pinned

rtc_region.description: Voice region ID for the voice channel

video_quality_mode.description: Video quality mode of the voice channel

message_count.description: Approximate count of messages in a thread

member_count.description: Approximate count of users in a thread

default_auto_archive_duration.description: Default auto archive duration for new threads

flags.description: Channel flags combined as a bitfield

total_message_sent.description: Total messages ever sent in a thread

default_thread_rate_limit_per_user.description: Default slowmode for new threads in this channel

default_sort_order.description: Default sort order for forum/media channels

PermissionOverwrite.description: A permission overwrite for a role or member

allow.description: Permission bit set for allowed permissions

deny.description: Permission bit set for denied permissions

auto_archive_duration.description: Duration in minutes to auto-archive after inactivity

archive_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the thread's archive status was last changed

invitable.description: Whether non-moderators can add users to the thread

create_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the thread was created
